summary.focus: Build the phase-1 trading console shell before live execution complexity.

watchlist.thesis: Phase 1 console should prioritize Home / Agents / Tasks / Trading without a greenfield rewrite.
watchlist.catalyst: Cross-agent coordination and backend/frontend contract alignment

executionQueue.title: Ship initial Home / Agents / Trading contracts
executionQueue.notes: Add stable JSON-backed routes first so the frontend can build against fixed shapes.

theses.title: Dashboard-first trading shell
theses.summary: The existing dashboard already has a task/automation backbone, so phase 1 should layer trader workflow panels on top of that baseline.
